_note: Reviewer follow-up #1: bare `<Inner on:NAME />` (no value) is event-bubble shorthand — the parent re-dispatches Inner's NAME event to its own consumers. Pre-fix the walker only flagged `has_bubbled_component_event` and skipped the `$on` call entirely, so a bubbled event name the child doesn't declare passed silently. Post-fix the walker pushes an `OnEventDirective` with an empty `handler_range`, the emit produces `$inst.$on("NAME", () => {})`, and the synth `"NAME"` literal carries a TokenMapEntry pointing at the source's `on:NAME` directive position. TS2345 (`Argument of type '"not_a_real_event"' is not assignable to parameter of type 'keyof $$Events'`) maps back to the source directive. Mirrors upstream svelte2tsx's `EventHandler.ts:147` shape (`$on("NAME", () => {})`).
